entry.title: Re: Edocument Brasil - Simular fatura customizado
entry.content: Conseguimos a muito custo resolver.

entry.title: "Output Control Reuse Component" usage
entry.content:
Hey there!

I have been trying to implement the "Output Control Reuse Component" (SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library) by embedding it into my Fiori Elements app by at this point I am a bit confused: would this app allow me to create/maintain new entries or it is only for display pruposes?  

In case it allows for creation/maintenance...would implementing it (oDatav V4) be as simple as described here?

Including Reuse Components on an Object Page - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK

Many thanks people!

entry.title: Change ekpo-adrn2 per BAPI
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to change the delivery address for each purchase order item (ekpo-adrn2). The whole adress and not only the street ... -> So how can I set adrn2 number per BAPI?

I try BAPI_PO_CHANGE and BAPI_ADDRESSORG_CHANGE. But it does not work for me. Maybe I use both of them wrong.

entry.title: Automated tender/RFP management for supplier - multinational corporate
entry.content:
Dear community,
We are looking to automated the tender management of our corporation by implementing an end-to-end solution that covers the following streams:
1. Identification/discovery of tenders/RFPs
2. Evaluation of discovered tenders/RFPs (summary, scoring, etc.)
3. Respoding/submitting to tenders/RFPs (project management, auto fill, etc.)

In our search we came across SAP ariba as a potential fit, but I couldn't find any more information for suppliers online. Does anyone know if SAP Ariba could be a feasible solution for this task?

entry.title: Re: Express document "Update was terminated" received fro...
entry.content:
Subject: Clarification on SAP Note 2564358 - Impact When VAS Is Not Maintained for AFS Materials

Thank you for your response DominikTylczyn,

I have reviewed SAP Note 2564358, and it appears to be relevant to our system. However, the note mentions as a prerequisite that VAS must be maintained on the purchasing side for AFS materials. In our case, some of our purchase orders do not include VAS. Could you please advise whether the implementation of this note will have any functional or technical impact when VAS is not maintained in certain purchase orders?

Can anyone guide me solve this issue?

entry.title: Re: Datasphere: Derive Value Restricted Measure Variable

The community for me it's a space for connection, support, and professional growth. I truly believe in the power of collaboration and how it can transform not only careers, but lives. A big hug to the whole SAP Community!

Just want to stop mail in outlook from workflow .

Let me know if any advice .

1. FINSC_LEDGER

2. OKKP

3. OBY6

entry.title: Re: Datasphere: Derive Value Restricted Measure Variable
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: SOP process flows in BPMN2.0 designed by SAP
entry.content: I’ve gone through this comparison process recently—trying to align our internal SOPs with those published by SAP in BPMN 2.0 format, particularly using Signavio. SAP provides quite a few reference models and accelerators through Signavio Process Explorer. If you haven’t already, I’d recommend starting there. It includes best-practice process flows (BPMN-compliant) across industries like supply chain, finance, and customer service. Some models are publicly available, while others might require SAP support access or a Signavio license. At Phonexa, we used those SAP-designed SOP flows as a baseline and mapped them against our internal process architecture. It helped us identify gaps and unnecessary complexity. The BPMN 2.0 compatibility made the comparison fairly smooth—especially when importing both flows into the same Signavio workspace for overlay analysis. Let me know which specific domain you’re working on—I might have an example or resource to share.

entry.title: Re: Digital badge didn't receive

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: S4 Conversion - ABAP tools to be used ADT( Eclipse ) or BTP ABAP ?
entry.content:
Hello - 

 

This question could be asked in multiple forum but is there any consolidation view which IDE is best fit for which kind of ABAP development . As business are transforming SAP ERP To S4 ( Green field , Brown field ) - carrying old legacy exits , implicit enhancement.. which ABAP development tool should be used - 

 

SAP GUI - still continues to ABAPer to go tool ?

ADT - Eclipse is to go tool now in S4 ( Private cloud , self managed S4 system ) 

BAS - ABAP cloud ... 

 

thanks

aakash

entry.title: Building and Deploying Custom POD Plugins in SAP BAS with Yeoman
entry.content:
Introduction

Custom POD plugins are a powerful tool for making significant changes to your digital manufacturing Production Operator Dashboards (PODs). While SAP supports Core Plugin Extensions that are useful for minor tweaks, custom POD plugins give you the flexibility you need for more substantial adjustments. Building and deploying your plugins with SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) makes them accessible in the POD Designer and Design Production Processes apps, enhancing their utility across different stages of production design. 

Yeoman is a project scaffolding generator that makes it easier to build and deploy your custom POD plugins by creating the necessary project framework from an SAP template. If you’d rather set up the multi-target application (MTA) for your custom POD plugin manually, take a look at Deploying Using SAP BAS.

 

Prerequisites

Before you begin, make sure you have the following:

  • Access to SAP Business Application Studio and SAP BTP Cockpit
  • Node.js installed on your system (you can download it from https://nodejs.org)

 

Procedure

1. Create/Open a Dev Space:

Navigate to Business Application Studio. If you have an existing Fiori Application dev space, open it from the list of dev spaces and proceed to Step 2. If not, choose Create Dev Space.

Name your new dev space, select SAP Fiori from the list of application types, and Create Dev Space. You do not need to add any extensions.

The dev space may take a few minutes to create. When its status changes from Starting to Running, select the dev space title to open it. When the dev space has loaded, you will see the Get Started page.

2. Create a Project Folder:

Choose the menu button in the top left corner, then Terminal > New Terminal.

In the terminal, enter cd projects, then mkdir podplugin to create a folder for your new POD plugin project.

Choose the menu button, then File > Open Folder.

Navigate to the podplugin folder in the search bar and choose OK to open it. The folder will open in the explorer panel.

3. Install and Run the Generator:

In the terminal (you may need to open a new one again), enter npm install -g yo to install Yeoman.

Enter npm install generator-dmcpodplugin to install the SAP POD plugin Yeoman generator.

Enter yo dmcpodplugin to run the generator. Answer the prompts based on your plugin needs and be sure to record your answers for later.

When the generator has finished, you will receive a success message.

5. Build and Deploy the MTA Project:

In the explorer panel, locate the mta.yaml file in your podplugin folder. Right click the file and choose Build MTA Project. This will generate a new folder called mta_archives.

Locate the .mtar file in the mta_archives folder. Right click the file and choose Deploy MTA Archive.

Before the MTA project is deployed, you may be prompted to enter your Cloud Foundry credentials. The Endpoint field is auto populated for you, and you can choose to sign in with your company credentials or by generating an SSO Passcode. When you are finished, choose Sign in.

Once authenticated, select the Cloud Foundry Organization and Space where you would like to deploy your MTA project, then choose Apply. Your MTA project will now start the deployment process, which may take a few minutes.

Once the project is deployed, locate the terminal line that says “Application ‘your_plugin_name’ started and available at ‘link’.” Copy the link URL and save it for later.

6. Confirm Successful Deployment in BTP:

Navigate to your account home page in BTP Cockpit and select the appropriate subaccount from the Account Explorer table.

In your Subaccount Overview, select the relevant dev space from the Cloud Foundry Environment Spaces table.

On the Applications page of your dev space, locate your POD plugin in the table. Successfully deployed applications will have the state Started.

7. Register the POD Plugin:

Navigate to the SAP Digital Manufacturing Launchpad and open the Manage Service Registry app.

In the app, select the UI Extensions tab from the menu.

Choose Create to begin registering your POD plugin.

Enter the relevant information for your POD plugin in the New UI Extension dialogue. For the URL field, enter ‘https://’ followed by the URL you recorded earlier. The Path should be “/” followed by the name of your POD plugin. The Namespace should match the one provided to the Yeoman generator, with any periods replaced by slashes, and the name of your plugin appended to the end. Select the Enabled checkbox for your POD plugin to be immediately available in POD Designer. Choose Create when you are finished.

8. Verify Successful Registration:

In the SAP Digital Manufacturing Launchpad, navigate to the POD Designer app and choose Create. Enter a name for your POD and select a POD type that supports your plugin (You specified these POD types in step 3). When you are finished, Choose Create.

Locate your POD plugin in the Plugins area of the Toolbox panel in POD Designer. Custom POD plugins are denoted by a blue row highlight indicator.

 

Result

The structure of your custom POD plugin project is now complete, and your plugin is deployed to POD Designer for future use. Your next step is to customize the plugin for your business needs. A list of custom plugin examples by type can be found here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/digital-manufacturing-extension-samples?tab=readme-ov-file#sap-digital-manufacturing-extension-samples. For more details on developing your custom POD plugin, see: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/pod-plugin-developer-s-guide/developing-plugins.

entry.title: Is it possible to create recurring appointments in SAP EWM DAS.
entry.content:
Is it possible to create recurring appointments in SAP EWM DAS.

Example - Carrier is coming daily at 11:00 AM, Mon to Friday for 1 year. Requirement is an appointment is created automatically by the system daily. I can't see any option in the create Appointment - Textual in FIORI for the same.

Also I read the below in Warehouse Management with SAP S/4HANA: Embedded and Decentralized EWM, Third Edition

The longest loading appointment should be assigned to a maximum of seven days. But how this can be achieved.

entry.title: Re: Enforce the total weight of the sections to add up to...
entry.content:
Hi all,

I've found the solution.

We need to include weight-total 100 and weight-total-option with "enforce" in summary section.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Cockpit Access using Corporate IDP for SAP Su...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please take a look at SAP Cloud Identity Services (CIS) — it gives you exactly the kind of flexibility you're asking for.

While the steps below aren’t same, they provide a hint to follow and tailor to your landscape:

Passwordless Authentication (Passkeys) with SAP BT... - SAP Community

In the trust configuration, are you getting the option for SAP Cloud Identity Service (IAS) as trusted

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Not able to run MDK application through run as local...
entry.content:
In the first screenshot the red lines are Warnings and are not impacting the runtime.

The error at runtime is an authentication error.  You should check the configuration of your BTP destination used by the metadata.

entry.title: No time-dependent conditions for indicator 01 when running job
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We have received this error message when we tried to run Calculate Item Interest for Accounts Receivable job --> No time-dependent conditions for indicator 01

This is in the app called Schedule Interest Calculation Jobs

What could be the problem?

entry.title: Re: S4 Conversion - ABAP tools to be used ADT( Eclipse )...
entry.content:
Hi Akash,

 

SAP GUI is still essential during transition phases, especially for legacy code cleanup.

ADT should be the default choice for all new development in S/4HANA (on-prem and private cloud).

BAS is your IDE for cloud-native ABAP in BTP ABAP runtime or clean-core extensibility.

Thanks

entry.title: Inteligência Artificial para Consultores Funcionais #SITCPS2025
entry.content:
Palestrante: @Secco 
Descrição da palestra: A apresentação demonstra como consultores funcionais podem utilizar a inteligência artificial para transformar negócios dos clientes, indo além de consultas básicas no ChatGPT e explorando soluções práticas e inovadoras.
Sobre o palestrante: João Secco é Arquiteto de Soluções SAP com mais de 10 anos de experiência. Ele é especialista em DRC NFe, grande apreciador de café e apaixonado pelo conceito de Clean Core.

A palestra de João Secco é uma imersão divertida, prática e técnica sobre como a inteligência artificial pode ser aplicada por consultores SAP funcionais no dia a dia. Desde o início, João estabelece um clima leve e participativo, pedindo para a plateia ajustar os lugares e tornando a interação mais fluida.

https://youtu.be/68VyqJo0MiM

João contextualiza sua trajetória pessoal e profissional, revelando seu envolvimento com a Movie Education, suas lives semanais sobre SAP e tecnologia, e sua paixão por compartilhar conhecimento com a comunidade.

O conteúdo se desenvolve mostrando como o ChatGPT e outras ferramentas de IA não devem ser subestimadas ou usadas apenas para tarefas básicas. João mostra que é possível utilizá-las para gerar cronogramas, roteiros de nutrição, scripts em Python, respostas profissionais para e-mails complicados, e até mesmo transcrições e traduções de aulas, economizando milhares de reais com soluções como Whisper da OpenAI.

Além disso, João introduz com clareza conceitos fundamentais como Machine Learning, Deep Learning e Generative AI, sempre conectando com exemplos reais, como o Waze, Netflix, reconhecimento facial da AWS e a importância do contexto nos dados. Ele explica que a IA aprende como uma pessoa: quanto mais dados e contexto, mais precisa será a resposta. Ele também diferencia ferramentas que apenas seguem lógica condicional (if/else) das verdadeiras inteligências artificiais que evoluem com uso e padrões.

Outro ponto relevante é como a SAP está lidando com IA. João destaca que a empresa, em vez de criar sua própria IA, optou por um modelo mais aberto e interoperável via BTP, permitindo que empresas escolham qual motor de IA usar, mascarando dados automaticamente para segurança e privacidade. Ele também comenta sobre o novo conceito de Business Data Context (BDC), que promete fornecer contexto semântico aos dados SAP, o que pode revolucionar a interação com IA dentro do ecossistema.

No encerramento, João trata da grande questão: a IA vai substituir consultores? Sua resposta é equilibrada: sim, algumas funções vão mudar, especialmente as mais operacionais e repetitivas. Mas ele reforça que há muitos espaços ainda não ocupados no mercado, e que os consultores que souberem usar IA para resolver problemas terão mais oportunidades e impacto.

A palestra de João Secco é uma verdadeira aula de como aplicar IA de forma prática, divertida e estratégica, especialmente para quem trabalha com SAP e quer se manter relevante no futuro digital.

Quer se preparar para o futuro? Essa palestra é um ótimo ponto de partida. Se quiser, posso gerar um resumo visual em diagrama, quiz ou artigo aprofundado sobre esse tema. É só pedir.

entry.title: Re: New font for Riyal symbol to be displayed in smartform
entry.content:
Hello,

I followed the same steps as you and got the same output. Then I copied this symbol from Word file and pasted it to smart forms. It appeared as a square in smart form and preview. However, after typing pdf! in command line, I was able to get the correct format.

 

I used this ttf file.

Joshymon J S

I’d like to explore ways to enhance or repurpose this data to deliver additional value or improved visualizations for users.

entry.title: Re: How to pass filters in SAP BTP destination REST API integration in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
@PratikShekokar11 Can you explain more what you are looking for and what trouble you are having?

P.S.: This question and answer is a little out of date since you can now use actions in SAP Build Apps, and in the action you can define whatever you want for the $filter property, including using placeholders and passing those when you call the action from with your app.

entry.title: Re: “quota exceeded" error in SAP Build basic trial envir...
entry.content:
Hi Anna and Margit

I'm facing the same issue when trying to create a new Process in the SAP Build trial environment.

I receive the same error about exceeding the permitted quota of 750. I also reached out to SAP Learning Support and received the same response regarding the public hosting limitations. If you or anyone else finds a workaround or solution, I'd be grateful to hear about it!

Best regards, Matheus

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@albertosimeoni - I believe we are talking about two different concepts.

1. SQL on Files: Standalone SAP HANA Cloud Data Lake - Has SQL on Files(File Adapter) capability to enable delta-sharing, and SAP BDC utilizes SAP HANA Data Lake Files as the underlying storage, where data is stored in Delta Tables. This setup allows for SQL queries to be executed directly on the files, leveraging the strong OLAP engine functionalities of HANA Cloud. This approach is beneficial for executing complex queries and analysis authorizations without moving data physically. Also, from QRC 04/2024, SQL on Files has started to support direct read-only access to files stored in an external object store(Amazon S3, Azure DL, and Google Cloud Storage) and supports external Delta Sharing via a dedicated Delta Sharing Adapter.

2. Open protocol delta-sharing: To enable zero-copy, this is exclusively enabled with SAP BDC via the SAP and Databricks partnership. Delta-share is a feature associated with SAP Databricks, which allows for seamless data sharing and integration without physically copying the data. It enables existing Databricks customers to connect their systems to SAP BDC, facilitating data sharing and integration without the need for data replication.

 

Thank you, Jeet

entry.title: SAP Meetup or Stammtisch Barcelona, May 8, 2025 / Call for attendees
entry.content:
Hola

Please take a look here to get details for next SAP Meetup/Stammtisch Barcelona

https://community.sap.com/t5/barcelona-events/sap-meet-up-barcelona-may-8th-2025/ec-p/14090712#M5

Hope to see you next Thursday!

David

entry.title: Re: IFRS 15 - Revenue Recognition
entry.content:
Hi Sanne,

The functionality of IFRS15 can be implemented in Event-Based Revenue Recognition at any stage. If you find that you need to ensure compliance with IFRS15 at a later date, please consult SAP as outlined in SAP Note 2524569. This enables you to adapt your system to meet the necessary compliance requirements seamlessly.

Best regards,

Petr

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch PLUS Luzern, 24. Juni 2025
entry.content:
Liebe SAP Community der Zentralschweiz

Am 24. Juni 2025 findet der nächste SAP Stammtisch PLUS Event in Luzern statt. Wir freuen uns auf möglichst viele Teilnehmende, Networking, gemeinsames Anstossen und Vorträge zu folgenden spannenden Themen:

  • SAP Cloud Application Programming (CAP) 
  • SAP Generative AI  

Anmelden könnt ihr euch wie immer direkt hier in unserer Location Group (siehe Button "Yes" oben rechts) oder unter nachfolgendem Link:

Anmeldung SAP Stammtisch PLUS Luzern

Bis bald!

Euer SAP Community OK in der Zentralschweiz

entry.title: Re: AIF - Application Interface Framework
entry.content: @ChrisThomson No, we can't define multiple RFC connections in single "Define Fixed Values" node to dynamically switch between them during runtime. The "Define Fixed Values" node supports assigning one fixed value per field. may be you can look for the options to choose BRF+ or through middle ware

entry.title: Question about SF ATS adoption in China
entry.content:
Hello,

we have a question.

We are developing the ATS module in SF. Our SuccessFactors data center is based in EU.

We have a question about the adoption in China, and its compliance according to the PIPL , considering that the ATS involves senstive personal data (such as National ID, Financial information etc) and that the regulations for handling such data are stricter than those for customer data

 

Do yo experiences of similiar scenarios - I mean of ATS adopted in china and with a data center based in eu?

 

Thanks in advance for your response

entry.title: Re: Signature Verification and Missing Resources Error Bu...
entry.content: I just tried using MDK 24.11.3 and after create-client finished, I opened the .xcworkspace, set my Team and ran Project | Archive to create my Enterprise build.  It compiled, signed and exported as expected for me.

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content: @GustavoSigrist is an SAP Note for SuccessFactors while this blog post is related to Enterprise SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: RAP Managed - Show/Hide standard buttons
entry.content:
READ ENTITIES OF zre_determination IN LOCAL MODE
ENTITY deter
ALL FIELDS
WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
RESULT DATA(entities).

result = VALUE #( FOR entity IN entities
( %tky = entity-%tky
%update = COND #( WHEN entity-Description IS INITIAL
THEN if_abap_behv=>fc-o-disabled
ELSE if_abap_behv=>fc-o-enabled ) ) ).

entry.title: Re: Using Postman For OData / Netweaver Gateway Testing CRUD Methods
entry.content:
If anyone is hosting a server on a virtual machine, on a local pc, instead of the hostname in the link, use localhost.
Which would look something like:

  • http://localhost:8000/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZABHIODATALEARN_SRV/POHeaderSet

entry.title: Re: I want to get Lead Contacts from Sales Cloud V1 to Em...
entry.content: Is there a way to get unqualified leads from Sales Cloud Version 1 into SAP Emarsys? I think you are giving the standard integration information here. You also give how to get new marketing contacts from Emarsys to SAP Sales Cloud version 1. I am looking to see how to get the (unqualified) lead contacts from SAP Sales Cloud version 1 into SAP Emarsys. Usually, when a lead is qualified, the lead is converted into an Account/Contact (which is standard integration). When the lead is unqualified, it isn't an account or contact yet.

entry.title: SAP Sales and Service Cloud 2505 Release Briefing
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, please see the presentation of the SAP Sales and Service Cloud 2505 release briefing. In this release we have mainly be focussing of further enhancement to the transition tool for V1-V2 Migration support. 

You will also see some enhancements to the intelligent sales add-on. We are also very happy to mention that finally our Groupware Server Side Integration is now also available in Saudi Arabia DC. 

There are also small enhancements to note in SAP Service Cloud core and Agent Desktop. 

Please note that the Release briefing offered for each release is designed to give you consolidated overviews on the key features for a release. These documents are not the sole source of truth about the release. Instead, the on-line help and What’s New information is intended for that purpose. The on-line help documentation becomes available to customers on the RTC or Release to Customer date of each release.

You can find the current help documentation here

entry.title: Re: SAC Adjusting for Rounding Difference
entry.content:
I was able to resolve this using a Break statement in a For Loop.

The code goes something like this:

INTEGER @n = 0

 

DATA([d/Measures] = #Pre) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "CALC_PC")
 
DATA([d/Measures] = #Post) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "ALLOC_IN")
 
DATA([d/Measures] = #Diff) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #Pre) - RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #Post)
 
FOREACH [d/Date]
DATA([d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "ALLOC_IN", [d/Measures] = #Chk) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Amount", [d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "ALLOC_IN")
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #Diff, [d/UE_SubItem] = "#") > 0 THEN
@Diff = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #Diff, [d/UE_SubItem] = "#")
ENDIF
FOREACH.BOOKED [d/Cost_Center], [d/xxx], [d/yyy]
@n = @n + 1
DELETE([d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "ALLOC_IN", [d/Measures] = "Amount")
DATA([d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "#", [d/Measures] = "Amount") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #Chk, [d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "ALLOC_IN") + @Diff
 
DATA([d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "ALLOC_IN", [d/Measures] = "Amount") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/UE_Audit_Trail] = "#", [d/Measures] = "Amount")
@Diff = 0
IF @n > 1 THEN
BREAK
ENDIF
ENDFOR
@n = 0

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
Hello @jeetendrakapase,

thank you it is better and more clear now, this opens a new question:

By reading the link posted I can get this:

- To have delta-share -> a delta-share server is needed.

- HDLF have delta share capabilities as it can communicate via delta-share with HANA Cloud (database).

My conclusion is that HDLF has a delta-share server, is it right?

So what I am thinking is that:

- if "zero-copy" functionality is only enabled for BDC,

- not having "zero-copy" functinoality in HDLF is more a "license limitation" than an architecture limitation. 

can you confirm so or am I mistaken other concepts?

Best regards,

Alberto

I updated the code above for people who may face similar use cases

entry.title: Re: SAP Sales and Service Cloud 2505 Release Briefing
entry.content: Me neither

entry.title: SAP BTP ABAP Environment - Switch to DigiCert G5 Root Certificate Authority
entry.content:
Current server certificates for the domains of the SAP BTP ABAP Environment (aka "Steampunk") are issued by the DigiCert G2 Root Certificate Authority (CA). Based on current recommendations, SAP is switching to the DigiCert TLS RSA4096 Root G5 CA, see SAP Note 3566727 for more details. This switch applies to the SAP BTP Cloud Foundry Environment, to the SAP BTP ABAP Environment, and to other SAP services. New regions of the SAP BTP ABAP Environment from Q1 2025 are already set up with the DigiCert G5 Root CA. For existing regions of the SAP BTP ABAP Environment, the switch from the DigiCert G2 Root CA to the DigiCert G5 Root CA is currently planned for Q3/2025.

 

Call to Action

Inbound Connections

If you manage trust stores of client applications/services, which connect to your SAP BTP ABAP Environment instance(s), by yourself, then add the DigiCert TLS RSA4096 Root G5 CA to these trust stores to ensure that your applications/services still can connect to the SAP BTP ABAP Environment instance(s) when the new server certificates are used. This applies to all supported protocols.

Since different (external) client applications / services are using different technical implementations for such trust stores, we cannot provide detailed instructions how to configure these trust stores.

Outbound Connections

For outbound connections from your SAP BTP ABAP Environment instances, for example, towards other services in SAP BTP Cloud Foundry environment, please check the trust settings for the DigiCert TLS RSA4096 Root G5 CA via the Maintain Certificate Trust List application. Since some releases, the Automatic Trust List Update feature is enabled and new certificates from the SAP trust list should have been added automatically to the trust store. If the CA is not contained in the list, click on Check for Updates and add the certificate, or add it manually. You can also download it here.

 

References

  • SAP Note 3566727 : Root Certificate Replacement in the SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry Environment
  • Blog Post: SAP BTP Cloud Foundry: Switching to higher security level Root Certificate Authority
  • Blog Post: SAP BTP ABAP Environment – New Root Certificate Authority
  • Github: Trust Store for SAP BTP

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content: @albertosimeoni - SQL on files, SAP HANA Cloud data lake files capabilities are extended to support Direct access (on-the-fly) using SQL on Files to read CSV, Parquet from HDLF, and other external storage like S3, Azure DL, and Google Cloud Storage. It has also extended using the Delta sharing Adapter to consume Delta tables. Delta tables: Delta tables are an improved version of Parquet files with a built-in transaction log. They behave like regular database tables, making them better for running queries. Besides accessing the files directly, you can also share and access delta tables using Delta Sharing. Please refer to the blog.

entry.title: RFFOAVIS_FPAYM payment advice print preview and spool not in custom form
entry.content:
Hello all,  when the email is generated for the payment advice, it is correct and has the custom form with our company logo, etc.   If I go to RFFOAVIS_FPAYM and do print preview or send to spool it is a blank/generic form.

What we are really looking for is a way to download a payment advice from say 6 months ago so that we can resend to the supplier or a different email.  I know that RFFOAVIS_FPAYM will resend to the email address in the supplier master but sometimes they request we send somewhere else.  We have given business access to SOST but that is only a short term solution as we don't want business to have SOST.  

FBZP > Paying Company Codes has the form set correctly.  As I said, it is working fine for the emails.

Is there something I'm missing to link the Z form to the print preview and spool? 

Thank you for any assistance.

Cheryl

entry.title: Re: Missing annotations in metadata
entry.content:
/sap/opu/odata/IWFND/CATALOGSERVICE;v=2/Annotations(TechnicalName='******',Version='0001')/$value/

your annotation has another url.

entry.title: Introducing SAP Commerce Cloud Live Sessions for Admins/Dev-Ops/IT Managers
entry.content:
Overview

Are you a System Administrator, Dev-Ops Manager, IT Project Manager or Technical Consultant working with SAP Commerce Cloud (in the Public Cloud, aka CCV2)? We’re excited to announce a series of live sessions tailored to your needs in setting up, installing, configuring, monitoring, and managing SAP Commerce Cloud servers. Each session delivers a comprehensive learning experience through a theory introduction, practical demos and interactive Q&A - ensuring you gain the skills and insights necessary for effective system management, configuration, and troubleshooting. Please note that while some sessions offer recordings for later viewing, not all sessions are recorded - so be sure to register and attend the live event if you want to participate in real-time.

Live Sessions Walk-through

Currently, we offer 5 independent live sessions as introduced below. Simply click on the direct links provided to check the upcoming schedules or available recordings:

  • Navigating the Cloud Portal in SAP Commerce Cloud (Duration: 2 hours, available from Q3 2025) - In this hands-on session, we explore the technical architecture of the SAP Commerce Cloud portal. Attendees will participate in a GUI walkthrough of key administrative tasks, equipping you with the essential skills required to manage SAP Commerce Cloud in the Public Cloud (CCV2).
  • Introducing SAP Cloud Logging (System) in SAP Commerce Cloud (Duration: 1 hour, available from Q3 2025) - Dive into SAP Cloud Logging (CLS) and discover how to efficiently access default log traces and retrieve log data. This session also covers configuring alerts to enable proactive system management and troubleshooting.
  • Introducing Consumption Credits for SAP Commerce Cloud (Duration: 1.5 hours, available from Q3 2025) - Learn all about Consumption Credits in SAP Commerce Cloud. This session reviews the Scalable Sandbox’s design for testing, demonstrates the Capacity Units Estimator with illustrative examples, and discusses best practices for usage monitoring and reporting.
  • Monitoring SAP Commerce Cloud with Dynatrace (Currently suspended; a recording is available on the live session page) - Join us for a detailed walk-through of the Dynatrace UI in this session. Learn how to monitor SAP Commerce Cloud in the Public Cloud (a.k.a. SAP Commerce Cloud Version 2 / CCV2) using the pre-bundled Application Performance Monitoring Software (APM) SAP CX Observability (Dynatrace). Gain insights from demonstrations of the essential monitoring and analysis features.
  • Exploring Data Retention Framework in SAP Commerce Cloud (Duration: 1 hour, available from Q3 2025) - This session introduces the Data Retention Framework in SAP Commerce Cloud, diving into its data structures and customization methods. You’ll learn effective procedures for configuring and implementing data retention policies tailored to meet your specific business requirements.

How to book?

  • Each session is available for independent registration, allowing you to choose based on your specific needs.
  • All live sessions are included for learners with a valid SAP Learning Hub subscription.
    • For SAP internals, you can use your SAP Learning Hub Internal Edition, just remember to activate/renew your internal edition (without cost) by clicking on the Access button on the edition portal page.

Last But Not Least

If you’d like to learn more or stay updated on our live sessions and other enablement offerings, please subscribe to the blog by clicking the “subscribe” button at the top of the page.

Thank you for reading, and happy learning!

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@albertosimeoni Excellent, you got it now.

That’s the key difference: BDC offers data products with a built-in catalog, storage on HDLF, while Delta tables enabled makes it possible to share data with platforms like Datasphere and Databricks.

In contrast, the standalone SAP HANA Cloud Data Lake currently does not support a Delta table catalog or external sharing with tools like Datasphere or Databricks.

entry.title: Re: SAC Adjusting for Rounding Difference
entry.content: Thanks a lot for your answer, i'll try a similar way !

entry.content:

please, does anyone know the name of the CDS where I can find this information of a Maintenance Order?

I am looking for a released CDS view (S4H Cloud Public Edition), therefore I cannot use just a random CDS or a BAPI or a table name. It will be used in a RAP Application.

Thank you in advance,

Matus

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: SAPPhire Orlando 2025: Helping secure BMS’s supply chain and drugs with track and trace solutions
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, My name is Aladdin Mandishah and I'm the Director of Global Customer Advisory at SAP with 15+ years of experience cross industries. In my role I advise the C-level executives on SAP Business Suite and AI solutions to drive innovation, efficiency, and compliance.

I’m excited to participate at SAP Sapphire Orlando this year, where I’ll be explaining one of the most pressing challenges in the pharmaceutical industry: Drug Counterfeit and how to secure patient lives, ensure supply chain resilience, and maintain secure operations.

My Session Overview

Helping secure BMS’s supply chain and drugs with track and trace solutions IND2349. I am presenting together with Priya Viswanathan (Bristol Myers Squibb) on 20th May 2024 at 1:00 PM - 1:40PM EDT as part of theSAP Sapphire and ASUG Pre-conference in Orlando.

 

What you will learn about

The global counterfeit drug market is estimated to reach $186 billion by 2030. threat, endangering patient lives and eroding trust in pharmaceutical supply chains. Fake or substandard medications cause hundreds of thousands of deaths annually, while regulatory bodies like the FDA, EMA, and WHO tighten serialization and traceability mandates to combat this crisis. 

In this insightful session, discover how Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMS) turned compliance into a strategic advantage, deploying  SAP Advanced track & Trace for Pharmaceuticals (SAP ATTP) and  SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Sciences (SAP ICH) to: 

  • Exchange serialization data in real time with global partners, closing detection gaps.
  • Automate exception handling to quarantine risks before they reach patients.

Future-proof operations against evolving regulations (DSCSA, EU FMD, etc.).

 Call to Action, Register Now

Looking forward to seeing you

Counterfeit drugs put lives and supply chains at risk, but innovative digital track-and-trace solutions are turning the tide. Join us at SAP Sapphire & ASUG Annual Conference Orlando to hear how Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMS) leverages SAP’s digital traceability technology to discover how you can replicate this success to protect patients and your operations.

Register here for our SAP Sapphire and ASUG Pre-conference  session: Helping secure BMS’s supply chain and drugs with track and trace solutions IND2349.

Save your seat today let’s build safer, smarter supply chains together!

Now let’s hear from you

When it comes to drug traceability, what's the one risk that keeps you up at night? Is it serialization gaps, partner collaboration hurdles, or staying ahead of new regulations? and looking ahead, what’s the one capability you wish your anti-counterfeit solution had by 2027? Share your biggest fear and future wish in the comment field below.

entry.title: New Enhancements from SAP Analytics Cloud for Story Reports - ToTime
entry.content:
Hello experts,

While checking the new features in the upcoming release I noticed something on the new features.

In this link, it's possible to read the following text:

Story calculations now supports new Date and Time functions:

  • ToTime(): Converts a DateTime input to a Time output.

But in a preview system, this is what we have:

I was expecting that I would be able to have only the time info on a datetime input but that's not what we have. We would need to have a string input and that's really weird.

Do you have any input when it comes to this?

Thank you so much in advance!

entry.title: Re: Different Profit Center derivation than the Cost Cent...
entry.content: Thank you very much, @erickgoulardt. My question arises because in the following link: Solucionado: Message KI339: Profit center was set to XXXXXX - SAP Community, it's mentioned that there was an SSCUI where it was possible to switch off this message. My doubt is whether this functionality was available in the past but is no longer accessible now? ? I just want to confirm that it hasn’t been replaced by another SSCUI providing the same functionality, since this feature has existed before in Public Cloud. Best regards, thank you in advance! 😉

entry.title: Re: SUM Shadow inctance on a remote application server
entry.content: The SAP  documentation says to start the SUM (Software Update Manager) on the PAS (primary application server). It's on the PAS that the SHADOW instance will run.

entry.title: Re: In the inbox, why " 'user' tagged the product" although it's just a reply?
entry.content: I am so sorry @Sandra_Rossi, it seems I forgot to get back to you here. We are investigating this currently, to see if it a bug or a notification feed text that should be changed.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Logistics Private Cloud Edition FAQ & Knowledge Base Series Compilation
entry.content: Excellent Summary

entry.title: Re: MSSQL DB - Drive X 90% full - alerts
entry.content:
The official tool to manage a MSSQL Server instance is this one: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/ssms/download-sql-server-management-studio-ssms. Inside, you will find several Reports that will answer your questions.

Regarding the free space remaining on the disk, you have 2 options:

  1. ARCHIVE/DELETE data and then perform a reorganization of the DB, and/or:
  2. Extend the disk size

entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Synchronization between Plant Maintenance and Accounting Assets (Manual)
entry.content: Thank you for your prompt response, Memem. However, this isn't possible in the transaction, since type V (vehicle) can be created with an external number, meaning you can define the number you require for the vehicle. And with type M, I only have one consecutive number. That's why it's necessary to create a new vehicle.

entry.title: Re: Synchronization between Plant Maintenance and Account...
entry.content:
Thank you for your prompt response, Memem.

However, this isn't possible in the transaction, since type V (vehicle) can be created with an external number, meaning you can define the number you require for the vehicle. And with type M, I only have one consecutive number.

That's why it's necessary to create a new vehicle.

Best Regards. Aguirre

entry.title: Re: Deleting the status dependant project version
entry.content:
Hi,

Project version RELEASED is status-dependent

Message No. OV010

If a project version is status dependent, then it is not possible to delete.

entry.title: Re: Updating Telephone number for Customers' Account in SAP BYD
entry.content: @Anant: The above mentioned solution will not work, The Solution which helped me to Update the Mobile number Data using SOAP UI.

entry.title: Re: Log in as another CB user
entry.content:
Hi @ISoma ,

The authentication is controlled by your Identity Access System (IAS), not your Public Cloud tenant itself.

In your IAS, go to Applications and Resources, select your application on the left panel, then on the right hand side, under Single Sign-on, Subject Name Identifier, there is a Configuration area. Here you can choose what to use as logon name. Most times we use email. But others should work as well.

With that said, my colleague asked a good question. What scenario do you have in mind?

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: Library view - price and item description
entry.content: That's interesting. The label should be found via its ID. Can you check the Learning version: Learning Administration > System Administration > Environment > Version?

entry.title: Re: ABAP custom code analysis using SAP Business Technology Platform
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am currently using BTP Custom Code Migration and have created a project for our ECC production system. We have been using Solution Manager to collect data for the last 6-7 years.  I have set up the project to use the usage data from solution manager, but I don't get an usage.  From what I see the FM AGS_CC_UPL_GET_LUSG_4_OBJECT in Solution Manager is called from the custom code migration application.  It looks like it is ultimately trying to get the data from  ODS Object 0SM_UPLLD ( /BI0/ASM_UPLLD00 ) . Currently there are no records in this table.  Any idea what could be missing?  When using the Solution Manager Cust Code Management I can see "Last Used" data.  

Thanks .

entry.title: Assignment Profile Update - triggered notification to whom?
entry.content:
Hello Team,
Hope you're doing well.

Currently I have one AP that excludes one specific Group Company. In the near future, this Group Company will be added to the AP (so won't be any more an exclusion). My question is the following: If I remove 'Company Z' from the Group Company exception and execute the AP again, who will get the assignment notification and the re-assignment? Only 'Company Z' users or all employees who are part of the AP?

I want to inform only 'Company Z' users, not all users who is part of the AP.

Thanks in advance,
Best Regards,
Sofia

entry.title: Delete 'Exam Objects (Legacy)'
entry.content:
Hello Team,
Hope you're doing well.


I'm working on a clean-up of 'Exam Objects (Legacy)', however, for some of them I receive the message '... cannot be removed because it is in use', and I checked and the legacy exam is linked to already completed items, hence item revision won't work.

Do you have any idea how I can delete or inactivate these legacy exams associated to items/previous completions?

If it's not possible to delete them (because they were used in the past?) is there some way to at least inactivate them? Or edit the title so I can add a 'Do not use' in the Legacy Exam Title?

Thanks a lot in advance!
Kind Regards,
Sofia

entry.title: Re: MODIFICATION OF THE VALUATION CLASS IN PRODUCT MASTER...
entry.content:
Hi Ismael,

 

Please follow the FAQ Question I'm unable to change the valuation class for a material. How can I fix this issue? which is relevant to S/4HANA Cloud .

"If you have open purchase orders or delivery schedule lines, you will get message "Purchase orders already exist.". You can find related purchase orders after you click 'Display Error' button. All the PO items which don't have deletion flag will be regarded as open PO though they have already been completed and invoiced. Since the status can be easily reversed back, the system only allows valuation class change if PO is deleted.

Select all PO items for the related material and delete them using the app Manage Purchase Orders "

 

Please delete the purchase order items as shown in your screenshot. wether the order is invoiced is not considered , only the deletion indicator

 

Best Regards

Enda
